))} {Array.from({length: 35}, (_, i) => { const day = i - 6; // Start from -6 to show previous month days const isCurrentMonth = day > 0 && day <= 31; const isHighlighted = [15, 16, 17, 22, 23].includes(day); const isToday = day === 16; return (
{isCurrentMonth ? day : ''}
); })}
